# Nelson Inno

> Salvadoran entrepreneur, Founder & CEO of WeSpark, author of Unstable Innovation, and TEDx speaker. Builds AI-powered education systems for large enterprises, governments, and universities.

## About
Nelson Inno is a Salvadoran entrepreneur based in San Salvador. He is the Founder and CEO of WeSpark, an innovation agency that designs AI-powered learning systems for Fortune 500 companies, governments, and universities. He co-designed Bitcoin Diploma 2.0 with El Salvador's National Bitcoin Office (ONBTC) — a curriculum the Ministry of Education plans to deliver to up to 500,000 students. His TEDx talk "Are Schools Prepared for the Future?" was delivered at TEDxVaduz in 2021.

## Work
- WeSpark (2019–present): AI product design, learning design, Bitcoin education — wespark.io
- Bitcoin Diploma 2.0 (2025–2026): Co-designed with ONBTC/Stacy Herbert; official national Bitcoin curriculum of El Salvador
- Gloria Kriete Foundation (2020–present): Multi-year educational partnership, Programa Oportunidades
- ADDN Advisor (2024–present): Ad-honorem Technology & Innovation Advisor to El Salvador's Agency for National Development and Design

## Books
- Unstable Innovation (January 2025) — unstableinnovation.com
- Diplomado en Bitcoin — Curso Oficial (April 2026, with MINED and ONBTC)
- Thinking in Images (forthcoming 2026)

## Media
- Forbes Centroamérica, ARD/ZDF, Cointelegraph en Español, Diario El Salvador, El Salvador in English
- TEDxVaduz 2021: "Are Schools Prepared for the Future?"
